title: EssenceBound
description: Adds 4 new bosses with special items and a crafting levelling system for 2 of them :)
body:
# **ESSENCEBOUND**
In this mod i added 3 new bosses and some cool weapons and tools with them.

## **BOSSES**

**Nether boss Aridam:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/851d581ec88c0a564b9499b205faf9db766a31b9_0.webp)
